title: Massachusetts Labor Rights Reference — Statute Index for 509dds Stewards
description: Statute and doctrine index compiled for SEIU Local 509 DDS chapter steward/grievance use. ~20 sections covering M.G.L. c.150E (public-sector bargaining), c.149 (wages, earned sick time, Wage Act triple damages, whistleblower §185, personnel records §52C, equal pay §105A), c.151 (minimum wage/OT), c.151B (anti-discrimination/accommodation), c.152 (workers' comp), c.175M (PFML), c.31 (civil service), plus FMLA, ADA, PWFA and pay-transparency law; and union doctrines (Weingarten, Loudermill, Duty of Fair Representation, past practice, management rights, mandatory subjects of bargaining).
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts; federal statutes where applicable to MA public-sector workers

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter (synthesized from MA & federal agency scrapes)

license: © SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter; free to redistribute with attribution (per folder README)
notes: Synthesized statute cross-reference — not legal advice; companion to the agency landing pages and sub-*.md primary scrapes. Sections are numbered and cross-referenced by the cheat sheet and member guide.
